title: Headings
description: A flexible heading component with size variants from h1 to h6, plus paragraph, label, code, and span styles.

manual.title: Add utility function
manual.description: Create a cn utility function if you don't have one already.

manual.title: Copy the component code
manual.description: Create a new file and paste the heading component code.

examples.title: H1
examples.description: size="h1" — the largest heading, typically used for page titles.

examples.title: H2
H3
H4
H5
examples.description: size="h5" — smaller sub-headings and sidebar titles.

examples.title: H6
examples.description: size="h6" — the smallest heading, for captions or labels.

examples.title: Paragraph
examples.description: Uses muted foreground color and is capped at max-w-2xl for comfortable reading line length.

examples.title: Label
examples.description: Extra small uppercase label style for section headings.

examples.title: Inline Code
examples.description: Use the code size for inline code snippets inside text.

examples.title: Custom Color
examples.description: Override the heading color using a Tailwind text utility class.
